name: 12L Gradient-Guided Quant + Partial RoPE + LN Scale + EMA + XSA4
blurb: 12 layers funded by gradient-guided adaptive quantization (int5/int6/int7 per-tensor based on gradient sensitivity). Partial RoPE (16/64 dims), LN Scale (1/sqrt(layer+1)), XSA on last 4 layers, EMA (0.997). Key finding: Late QAT is counterproductive at 12L — throughput cost exceeds quant improvement.
author: Sam Larson
